calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-22-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael J. Smith, Esq. for and with Appellant/Defendant Kelly Bowhay; Plaintiff/Respondent Vantigo LLC is present, represented by its owner Erik Horman, with witness Chad Thompson.

This matter comes on regularly for Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are affirmed.

Mr. Smith submits an appeal brief which is treated as an exhibit. Mr. Smith states the document does not need to be returned.

Appellant Kelly Bowhay offers testimony.

Mr. Horman offers a summary of the claim, which is treated as an exhibit, on behalf of Respondent Vantigo LLC. Mr. Horman also states the document does not need to be returned.

Witness Chad Thompson offers testimony on behalf of Respondent Vantigo LLC.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. Judge Pro Tem: Michelle Brant, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-15-2019 Judgment Entered
